metaDescription: Need a gas safety certificate in London and Sussex? Book a Gas Safe engineer for appliance and pipework checks with clear reporting and certification support.
h1: Gas Safety Certificate in London and Sussex
intro: We provide gas safety certificate visits across London and Sussex for homeowners, landlords and agents who need checks carried out by a Gas Safe registered engineer with clear reporting afterwards.
pricingGuidance: Gas safety certificate pricing depends on the number of appliances and property setup, with clear guidance before the visit is confirmed.
localProof: Regularly booked for flats, houses and managed rental properties across London and Sussex.

sections.heading: What a gas safety certificate visit covers
sections.body: A gas safety visit focuses on the condition and operation of relevant gas appliances, associated pipework and key safety points within the property.

sections.heading: Who typically books this service
sections.body: Homeowners may book a gas safety check for peace of mind, while landlords and agents often need documented certification for rental compliance.

sections.heading: Why clear reporting matters
sections.body: The visit needs to do more than produce a certificate. It should also identify defects, access issues and any follow-up work needed so there is no confusion afterwards.
